examples: Well, gentlemen, you are about to see a baked Appel.
In 2002 I invited Appel to our Caribbean Camp as a guest instructor.
Moving Average Convergence-Divergence (MACD) is an indicator invented by Gerald Appel (Chapter 7).
Karlan, Appel, Duflo and Banerjee tackle that question through randomized control trials (RCTs).
Rather than letting otherwise substantial facts speak for themselves, Karlan and Appel over qualify their evidence.
